entries.title: Billable Hours Slipping? Focus Timer for Lawyers | Superfocus
entries.description: Block time for research and briefs. Pomodoro or Deep Work. Track focus sessions. Free.
entries.h1: Six billable hours logged. Two were actual legal work.
entries.painPoints:
Reactive all day.
Deep work at midnight.
Billable time wasted.
entries.recommendedSounds: Rain or minimal lofi for document review
entries.heroSubtitle: Email, admin, and context-switching eat the research and drafting that clients actually pay for.
entries.painSolution:
Block 90 min for research.
Timer on. Email closed.
Bill real hours.

entries.title: Context Switching Killing Your Designs? | Superfocus
entries.description: 45-min Flow blocks for creative deep work. Lofi + cafe sounds. Ship designs faster. Free.
entries.h1: You opened Figma to design. You're still replying to Slack.
entries.painPoints:
Figma open. Slack louder.
Never enter creative flow.
Revisions multiply.
entries.recommendedSounds: Lofi or cafe for creative focus
entries.heroSubtitle: Creative work needs uninterrupted blocks. Your calendar doesn't have any.
entries.painSolution:
45-minute design block.
Notifications off. Lofi on.
One concept. Done.

entries.title: Literature Piling Up? Research Focus Timer | Superfocus
entries.description: Pomodoro or Flow for reading and writing. Structure research sessions. Try Superfocus free.
entries.h1: Your literature review list grows. Papers read: zero.
entries.painPoints:
Papers bookmarked. None read.
No blocks for synthesis.
Review never finishes.
entries.recommendedSounds: Rain or ambient for long reading
entries.heroSubtitle: Research requires sustained attention you never allocate. Reading gets squeezed into scraps between meetings.
entries.painSolution:
25 min per paper. Take notes.
Repeat daily.
Review progresses.

entries.title: Grading Never Ends? Focus Timer for Teachers | Superfocus
entries.description: Sprint or Pomodoro for grading and planning. Block time between classes. Free for educators.
entries.h1: Grading follows you home every night.
entries.painPoints:
Grade at midnight.
Prep in five-min gaps.
Always behind.
entries.heroSubtitle: Between classes, meetings, and emails, lesson prep and grading happen in exhausted fragments.
entries.painSolution:
Block 25 min for grading.
Batch papers. Timer off.
Home at a reasonable hour.

entries.title: Deck Due Tomorrow? Consultant Focus Timer | Superfocus
entries.description: Block time for analysis and deliverables. Pomodoro + Todoist sync. Track billable focus. Free.
entries.h1: The deck is due tomorrow. You haven't opened PowerPoint.
entries.painPoints:
Calls all day. Deck at midnight.
Quality suffers. Sleep too.
Unsustainable cycle.
entries.heroSubtitle: Client calls fill the calendar. Deep analysis and slide building happen in panic mode the night before.
entries.painSolution:
Morning block for deck work.
90 minutes protected.
Deliver without panic.

entries.title: No Time to Plan? PM Focus Timer | Superfocus
entries.description: Sprint blocks for planning and reviews. Structure your day before it structures you. Free.
entries.h1: You manage everyone's time except your own.
entries.painPoints:
Everyone's priority. Yours last.
Planning skipped again.
Projects drift.
entries.heroSubtitle: Status updates, standups, and fire drills consume the day. Planning happens never—or at 6pm.
entries.painSolution:
First pomodoro: your planning.
Before inbox. Before standup.
Lead instead of react.

entries.title: Content Always Overdue? Marketer Focus Timer | Superfocus
entries.description: Pomodoro or Flow for content creation and campaign planning. Cafe sounds included. Free.
entries.h1: Content calendar says "publish." Draft says empty.
entries.painPoints:
Calendar full. Content empty.
Creative work gets scraps.
Deadlines win.
entries.recommendedSounds: Cafe or lofi for content focus
entries.heroSubtitle: Campaigns need creative blocks. Your day gives you notifications instead.
entries.painSolution:
Block creative time first.
25 min draft. No editing.
Publish on schedule.
